scripts.setup: pnpm install && pnpm run build:packages && pnpm run build:angular
scripts.start:lib: npm run build:angular && npm --prefix examples/angular run start
scripts.build:angular: pnpm run build:core && tsc -p packages/widgets/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/zod/tsconfig.json && ng-packagr -p packages/angular/ng-package.json -c packages/angular/tsconfig.lib.json && node scripts/prepare-angular-dist.mjs
scripts.build:demo: npm run build:angular && npm --prefix examples/angular run build
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:adapters && npm run test:widgets && npm run test:angular
scripts.test:angular: npm run build:core && tsc -p packages/zod/tsconfig.json && jest -c packages/angular/jest.config.cjs
scripts.test:bundle: npm --prefix packages/angular/bundle-test run build && node scripts/check-bundle.mjs
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:core && tsc -p packages/widgets/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/zod/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/standard-schema/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/vue/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/react/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/lit/tsconfig.json && npm run build:styles
scripts.test:adapters: npm run build:packages && node --test packages/zod/test/*.test.mjs packages/standard-schema/test/*.test.mjs packages/vue/test/*.test.mjs packages/react/test/*.test.mjs packages/lit/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.demo:angular: npm run build:angular && npm --prefix examples/angular run start
scripts.demo:react: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs react 4301
scripts.demo:vue: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs vue 4302
scripts.demo:lit: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs lit 4303
scripts.release: npm run build:packages && npm run build:angular && node scripts/publish-workspace.mjs && node scripts/publish-angular.mjs
